package rulecoverage

func PositiveRedisLargeValueWithoutCompression() string {
    ruleID := "redis_large_value_without_compression"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`rdb.Set(ctx, key, largePayload, ...)` where `largePayload` is the result of `json.Marshal` on a large struct or slice, without visible compression"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
